session_note: S107 - BATCH A: the four S105/S106 carry-forwards, owner-mandated as one thorough autonomous session ('run all the carry forward items ... Batch A ... I pre-approve full session priority batch pdr and autonomous run'). Next = Batch B, then Batch C. EXEC ORDER (bank safe first): P0 test-flake hygiene -> P3 Voltkin cleanup -> P4 bot-pentagram fix -> P1 leader-decay (PROPORTIONAL, not flat; +minimal visible cue) -> P2 worker-sim FOUNDATION (replay test + state hash + cost probe; cutover/pooling/grid/audit carried forward with documented blockers). Structure-loss CLAWBACK held as separate future owner-gated PDR. FULL tier. PDR: .claude/plans/2026-06-26_PDR_Session_107_Batch_A.md
council_result: Batch A scoped + adversarially verified via wf_d37331f2-37a (4 deep investigators; worker-sim 3-lens refute panel DETERMINISM/FEASIBILITY/SCOPE-REALISM). 10 agents, ~600K tok, 280 tools. All 4 verdicts SHIP-WITH-FIXES, high conf. MODEL DEVIATION (logged): investigators ran on Haiku (agentType:'Explore' downgrade) -> Opus orchestrator PRIME-AUDIT performed. PRIME-AUDIT deltas: (1) REFUTED worker-safety claim - state/godlyOrchestration.ts imports render/* (cutsceneOverlay/audioManager/codexStore) so the sim graph is NOT cleanly worker-safe -> runHostTick extraction harder, ?worker=1 cutover stays carry-forward with documented blocker. (2) REFUTED 1664/1664 - actual 1663/1664 (stress.test.ts timing flake 51>50ms) -> added P0 hygiene fix. (3) REFINED leader-decay: PROPORTIONAL (bleed=rate*(score-threshold)) over the scope's flat rate (no hard WIN-cap, self-limiting) + minimal visible cue per S106 invisible-bug lesson. (4) CONFIRMED via own reads: tickScoring host-only slot, Voltkin asset map + zap.png referencers + anim-test disk-read dep, botSpawnerSeed PENTAGRAM_REACH+240 pure geometry. P2 ships the SAFE foundation (stepPhysics replay test + state hash + snapshot-cost probe); refactor/cutover/pooling/grid/transcendental-audit carried forward honestly.

priorities.label: S107 P0 - Harden stress.test.ts perf-timing flake (51>50ms machine-variant). Restore a trustworthy green baseline before changing sim code.
priorities.check_method: S107 P0 DONE (4477892). tsc 0; full vitest 1664/1664 (was 1663/1664: stress.test.ts perf flake). Replaced the worst-single-tick<50ms assertion (machine-variant: a 51.01ms transient GC/scheduler spike over 3600 ticks failed an otherwise healthy run) with a p95<50ms gate (immune to a handful of outliers, still catches systemic slowdown) + a worst<1000ms catastrophic-pathology canary (a real O(n^2)/NaN cascade is seconds/tick + trips the 60s timeout). Test-only; zero sim/wire impact. Restores a trustworthy green baseline before sim changes.

No code loads any deleted asset (grep + tsc + vite build all clean).

priorities.label: S107 P4 - Bot self-breaks own pentagram: robust fix = mark 5 seeded ring nodes no-auto-bond (filter on existing spawner-owned property if possible, else additive-optional flag); fallback relocate+340 with invariant comment. Replay HARD gate + new degree-preserved test.
priorities.check_method: S107 P4 DONE (1b7eb73). tsc 0; vitest 1666/1666 (+2); build clean; bundle 596.8/750. ROOT confirmed via own reads: bots mode isNetworked (gameMode!='solo') -> bot placements are remote-origin -> resolve through pickHostTargetPrimitive + collectHostMergeCandidates (placePrimitive.ts); the host auto-MERGE sweep (same-colour within MERGE_REACH=100) bonds the bot's frontier into its own seeded pentagram ring -> node degree 2->3 -> recipeStillSatisfied/isPentagramComponent re-validation tears the spawner down. FIX (robust, distance-independent, chosen over the verifier-REFUTED 'relocate +340' band-aid): new collectSpawnerLockedPrimitiveIds(world) = each live spawner anchor's connected component; excluded from auto-bond candidacy at pickHostTargetPrimitive + collectHostMergeCandidates + the merge-sweep loop (latter covers the LOCAL path -> also protects a HUMAN building beside their own pentagram, same latent vector). Derived from existing world.creatureSpawners + bond graph -> NO new primitive field, NO wire/PROTOCOL change, re-derived per placement (survives host-migration). Explicit sever (raid counterplay) untouched. Kept PENTAGRAM_REACH +240 (ring stays raidable). +2 tests with before/after signal (ring IS an in-range candidate without the lock, excluded with it). Determinism HARD gate unchanged (seed untouched).

priorities.label: S107 P1 - Anti-coast LEADER SCORE-DECAY (PROPORTIONAL: bleed=rate*(score-threshold), floor=threshold, host-only in tickScoring, solo-exempt) + minimal visible 'coasting' cue. Constants tunable. Replay determinism + WIN/HUNTER-unaffected tests.
priorities.check_method: S107 P1 DONE (63913d0). tsc 0; vitest 1677/1677 (+11: 7 decay + 4 ownDecaying cue); build clean; bundle 597.1/750. Anti-coast LEADER SCORE-DECAY: once the leader passes 75% of win, score bleeds back toward the threshold at bleed/sec = LEADER_DECAY_RATE_PER_SEC(0.01) x (score - threshold). PROPORTIONAL (PRIME-AUDIT refinement over the scoped flat rate): zero at threshold, self-limiting -> can NEVER drop below threshold, NEVER hard-caps the win (income>decay above the ~39 equilibrium complexity still climbs). Host-only in tickScoring (pure fn of synced state+tick -> replay byte-equivalent; clients read decayed scoreProgress), re-derives post-decay max so WIN gate + HUNTER stay exact, EXEMPT in solo. Visible cue (S106 invisible-bug lesson): progressBarFractions returns ownDecaying -> drawProgress tints own-bar AMBER when coasting leader (gentle bleed too small to trip the red drop-flash). 2 owner dials (RATE + THRESHOLD_FRACTION). CLAWBACK alternative = separate future owner-gated PDR. Updated distributed-pipeline WIN test to complexity 80 (>equilibrium) so the leader still crosses; all other win/tier tests are solo (decay-exempt) or accrue below threshold -> unaffected. Runtime amber tint + felt balance = owner playtest (only manifests past 75% in non-solo).

priorities.label: S107 P2 - Worker-sim FOUNDATION increment: SHIP stepPhysics replay-determinism test (runStepPhysicsStress) + deterministic state hash (additive) + dev snapshot-cost probe. CARRY-FORWARD (documented blockers): runHostTick extraction (render-coupled via godlyOrchestration), pooling/delta-encode (measure first), collision grid 64->8, transcendental/accumulation-order audit, ?worker=1 cutover.
priorities.check_method: S107 P2 DONE (02a1112). tsc 0; vitest 1684/1684 (+7: 4 stateHash + 3 stepPhysics determinism); build clean; bundle 597.1/750 UNCHANGED (stateHash.ts is test-only -> zero production wire, confirming pure groundwork). Worker-sim FOUNDATION increment (scope workflow's 3-lens panel UNANIMOUS 'groundwork-only' — full cutover not ship-quality in a 4-item batch). SHIPPED: (1) stepPhysics PHYSICS-LOOP replay-determinism HARD gate (runStepPhysicsStress: 2 same-seed 300-tick runs byte-identical + hash-equal) - the backlog's named prerequisite; every prior gate drove the reducer path, none the Verlet/bond/collision loop a worker runs. (2) hashWorldState pure FNV-1a cross-check oracle (sorted-by-id, order-invariant) + tests (deterministic/sensitive/order-invariant); NOT on the wire (no consumer -> premature). (3) WORKER_SIM_FOUNDATION.md: determinism AUDIT (verdict worker-SAFE within a browser: sqrt/hypot IEEE754, same-V8 sin/cos, deterministic accrual+iteration order, now PROVEN) + PRIME-AUDIT render-coupling blocker (state/godlyOrchestration.ts imports render/*) + sequenced cutover plan. CARRY-FORWARD (documented): runHostTick extraction (untangle render-coupling, ~410-560 LOC), pooling/delta-encode (MEASURE first), grid 64->8, cross-V8 transcendental audit, ?worker=1 cutover. No felt-smoothness this session by design — laid the verifiable foundation honestly vs shipping a risky core-loop refactor.

carry_forward_priorities: ANTI-COAST structure-loss CLAWBACK (owner-gated, own PDR): severing a connector / killing a spawner DOCKS banked score. Overturns the S76 'banked score is safe' invariant -> floor at 0, host-only, serialized, replay tests. Held out of Batch A deliberately.

WORKER-SIM remainder (P2 carry, documented blockers): runHostTick extraction is ~410-560 LOC AND render-coupled (state/godlyOrchestration.ts imports render/*) - untangle sim-mutation vs render-side-effects first; snapshot pooling/delta-encode (the real O(world)/100ms fix - MEASURE ROI via the new probe first); collision grid 64->8 (after replay test locks behavior + 8-bit overflow assert); transcendental + float-accumulation-order audit (resolveCollisions/solveBonds; host vs worker V8 Math equivalence UNVERIFIED = the cutover blocker); ?worker=1 flag-gated cutover (blocked on all prior).
Leader-decay HUD: richer cue + playtest-driven bleed-rate/threshold tuning (P1 ships conservative + a minimal cue).
Batch B (next session): Tier-1 G1b MOTION / G2 family traits (needs LOCKED 6 amend) / G3b codex silhouettes / G4 leader-crown + BOND_COMMIT.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P0 #a-flaky-perf-gate-erodes-the-suite-and-must-be-hardened-not-tolerated: the handoff said vitest 1664/1664 but a fresh run was 1663/1664 - stress.test.ts asserted the WORST single tick over 3600 ticks be <50ms, a machine-variant wall-clock gate that a lone 51.01ms GC/OS-scheduler spike fails. Fix = assert the p95 (immune to transient outliers, still catches a 5%+ systemic slowdown) + a worst<1000ms catastrophic-pathology canary (a true O(n^2)/NaN blowup is seconds/tick + also trips the 60s test timeout). LESSON: a perf assertion on a single MAX is inherently flaky; gate on a percentile + a far-looser catastrophic ceiling. Establish a trustworthy green baseline BEFORE editing sim code, or you can't tell a regression from pre-existing noise.

P3 #dead-asset-cleanup-must-trace-the-WHOLE-import-graph-not-trust-the-scope: the Haiku scope said 'KEEP voltkinFrames.ts - 8 sim/test importers' but a full consumer grep showed it is ENTIRELY test-only post-S106 - currentSpriteUrl + currentAnimCell have ZERO production callers (the cited 'prod refs' in creature.ts/save.ts are doc-comments), and currentFrameKey/VoltkinFrameKey survive only because sync.test.ts uses them as a WIRE-DETERMINISM cross-check (host+client reconstruct the same frame key from synced fields). Kept the module for that test value, but deleted 13 dead asset files + the dead URL exports. TRAP avoided: deleting the 5 frame PNGs while VOLTKIN_FRAME_URLS still names them is safe ONLY because no test does readFileSync on them (they inspect the URL STRINGS) and no runtime path loads them - verified before deleting. Converted the on-disk anim.json drift-guard (which validated a now-deleted artifact) to assert the inline canonical manifest instead, preserving coverage without the disk dep. LESSON: 'dead-asset cleanup' = trace every exported symbol's real consumers (prod vs test, import vs comment) before deleting the asset OR pruning the code; a scope's KEEP/DELETE list is a hypothesis to verify, not a fact.

P4 #fix-the-mechanism-not-the-distance-and-derive-state-dont-store-it: the bot self-broke its seeded pentagram because the host AUTO-MERGE sweep bonded its frontier into its own ring (degree 2->3 fails the recipe). The scope's first instinct (relocate the ring +100px) was REFUTED by the adversarial verifier as a band-aid (still reachable in ~4 hops). The robust fix attacks the MECHANISM: exclude any live spawner's locked-ring component from auto-bond candidacy. Chose to DERIVE the locked set from existing world.creatureSpawners + the bond graph (collectSpawnerLockedPrimitiveIds) rather than add a noAutoBond flag to Primitive -> zero new wire/save field, survives host-migration for free (re-derived per placement), and incidentally fixes the SAME latent self-break for a HUMAN building beside their own pentagram (applied at the merge-sweep chokepoint covering both remote + local paths). LESSON: when a 'just move it / just bump the constant' fix is offered, check whether it addresses the mechanism or only lowers the probability; and prefer deriving protective state from authoritative existing state over storing a new serialized flag.

P1 #proportional-rubber-band-beats-flat-AND-the-existing-tests-pin-the-rate: anti-coast leader-decay shipped as PROPORTIONAL bleed = rate*(score-threshold) rather than the scoped FLAT rate, because proportional is self-limiting (zero at the threshold, floored there) so it can never hard-cap a deserved win - a builder whose income exceeds the decay at their score still climbs. The KEY constraint that set the rate: the existing WIN-driving tests accrue a structure to 786 THROUGH the decay zone, so any rate strong enough to be a real anti-coast (equilibrium complexity > the test's structure) STALLS them. Resolved by (a) decay is gated gameMode!='solo' and makeWorld defaults to solo, so MOST unit tests are decay-exempt by construction, and (b) the one non-solo WIN test (distributed-pipeline, complexity 6) was rebuilt to complexity 80 (> the ~39 equilibrium) so a committed builder still wins - which is exactly the intended new semantic. Visible cue per the S106 invisible-bug lesson: the own-bar already recedes but the gentle bleed is sub-threshold for the red drop-flash, so added an AMBER tint via a new progressBarFractions.ownDecaying flag. LESSON: when adding a score-mutating mechanic, the existing accrual/win tests ARE the calibration harness - run them to discover the rate's real-world constraint, and prefer a self-limiting (proportional, floored) shape so you never accidentally make the game unwinnable.

P2 #the-honest-milestone-increment-is-the-verifiable-foundation-not-a-risky-half-cutover: 'smooth regardless of host' is a multi-session milestone; the 3-lens scope panel UNANIMOUSLY said the ?worker=1 cutover is not ship-quality landable in a 4-item batch (render-coupling + unmeasured pooling ROI + cross-context Math). Best-interests call = ship the SAFE critical-path foundation (a stepPhysics replay-determinism HARD gate that LOCKS the physics loop + a pure hashWorldState cross-check oracle + a determinism AUDIT proving worker-safety within a browser + a sequenced cutover plan) and carry the risky refactor forward with DOCUMENTED blockers - rather than ship a half-working cutover that could silently desync. KEY: the existing determinism gates all drove the reducer path; the part a worker actually runs (Verlet/bond/collision via stepPhysics) was UNGUARDED - so the highest-value safe deliverable was the test that proves IT deterministic. Also kept the state hash OFF the wire (no consumer yet = premature serialization). LESSON: for a big architectural milestone, the first session's deliverable is proof + plan (lock current behaviour with a test, audit the risk, sequence the phases), not a rushed cutover; and 'profile before optimizing' (S105) means SHIP THE PROBE/measurement before the optimization it justifies.
